title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
